_meta.purpose: Viral cytopathology / inclusion bodies on histology, cytology (Pap/Tzanck) or smear -> the virus + disease. Keys are YOLO class names from the `virology_cyto` detector. Viruses themselves are sub-microscopic; these are the CELLULAR footprints of viral infection. Decision support only; a pathologist/cytopathologist confirms and molecular (PCR/IHC) proves the virus.
_meta.source: Diagnostic cytopathology / surgical pathology viral CPE references (CDC, WHO). Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

cmv_inclusion.name: CMV 'owl-eye' intranuclear inclusion
cmv_inclusion.note: Large cell with basophilic intranuclear inclusion + halo (owl-eye) ± granular cytoplasmic inclusions. Important in immunocompromised/HIV, transplant, congenital. Confirm IHC/PCR.

hsv_inclusion.name: HSV/VZV cytopathic effect (Cowdry A)
hsv_inclusion.note: 3 M's: Multinucleation, nuclear Moulding, Margination of chromatin (ground-glass nuclei); Tzanck smear. Confirm HSV/VZV PCR or DFA.

koilocyte.name: Koilocyte (HPV cytopathic effect)
koilocyte.note: Perinuclear halo + raisinoid hyperchromatic nucleus. Cervical HPV -> LSIL; overlaps the cytology detector. HPV test/follow-up.

molluscum_body.name: Molluscum (Henderson-Paterson) body
molluscum_body.note: Large eosinophilic intracytoplasmic inclusions filling keratinocytes. Extensive lesions -> consider immunosuppression/HIV.

negri_body.name: Negri body
negri_body.note: Eosinophilic intracytoplasmic inclusion in neurons (hippocampus/Purkinje). CRITICAL/notifiable; confirm DFA/PCR.

viral_cytopathic_effect.name: Non-specific viral cytopathic effect
viral_cytopathic_effect.note: Ballooning, syncytia, ground-glass or smudge cells without a specific signature. Confirm with IHC/PCR/culture.
